name: Legendary: Healing Salve
description: 🍃♥️INTRODUCING: LEGENDARY: The Healing Salve You’ve Been Waiting For ♥️🍃We’re proud to announce both the DMSO FREE &amp;  DMSO infused Essiac salve complemented with a castor oil base. “LEGENDARY” Healing Salve is officially complete — and our first batch is available for PRESALE starting NOW. This is more than just a salve — it’s a breakthrough in external herbal therapy, crafted for those who need real, targeted relief and deep support. If you’re targeting Tumors, cysts, or internal masses—Go with the DMSO but be SURE to follow the included sterile guidelines for application and you must only apply once daily for 5 days and then cycle off for 2.If you’re looking for relief of general pain, inflammation, poor circulation and lymphatic flow—Go with the DMSO FREE and you won’t have to worry about sterile precautions or taking the 2 day break from the product. Safe for daily use and no need to wear gloves to apply. This salve will last up to THREE months depending on area of treatment with daily use. We chose only the best ingredients, and cleanest lab tested herbs, sparing no expense to provide you with the most effective product.

This is more than skincare.It’s remembrance. Ritual.A return to what your skin knows by heart.

name: Out of the Woods
description: Our all natural poison oak/poison ivy treatment with bentonite clay &amp; calendula!Cover the affected area for 20 minutes and let dry. Rinse with cool water after 20 minutes. (DO NOT WIPE).Apply every 4 hours until rash is clear!Our client was completely clear of his rash in just 48 hours using this product and it stopped his discomfort and also contained and kept it from spreading!
